description: Only non-rule keys are set; every grok-build rule key is unset at user scope.

findings.message: Cannot determine feedback system posture: features.feedback is unset in the user-level config; the user guide documents default true, but uninspected CLI flags, environment variables, managed/requirements config, or other layers may determine the effective value.
findings.unknown_reason: features.feedback is unset in the user-level config; the user guide documents default true, but uninspected CLI flags, environment variables, managed/requirements config, or other layers may determine the effective value.

findings.message: Cannot determine external OpenTelemetry raw prompt export posture: telemetry.otel_log_user_prompts is unset in the user-level config; the user guide example redacts raw prompts (false) and OSS types default the Option to None (off unless enabled), but uninspected CLI flags, environment variables, managed/requirements config, or other layers may determine the effective value.
findings.unknown_reason: telemetry.otel_log_user_prompts is unset in the user-level config; the user guide example redacts raw prompts (false) and OSS types default the Option to None (off unless enabled), but uninspected CLI flags, environment variables, managed/requirements config, or other layers may determine the effective value.

findings.message: Cannot determine product telemetry master-switch posture: features.telemetry is unset in the user-level config; OSS TelemetryMode defaults to Disabled and the user guide shows an explicit false example, but uninspected CLI flags, environment variables, managed/requirements config, or other layers may determine the effective value.
findings.unknown_reason: features.telemetry is unset in the user-level config; OSS TelemetryMode defaults to Disabled and the user guide shows an explicit false example, but uninspected CLI flags, environment variables, managed/requirements config, or other layers may determine the effective value.

findings.message: Cannot determine session/trace upload sub-switch posture: telemetry.trace_upload is unset in the user-level config; OSS documents that None inherits [features] telemetry, so the effective value cannot be established from this key alone without inspecting the master switch and other layers.
findings.unknown_reason: telemetry.trace_upload is unset in the user-level config; OSS documents that None inherits [features] telemetry, so the effective value cannot be established from this key alone without inspecting the master switch and other layers.
